Ngọc Tâm Holdings JSC (Công ty Cổ phần Ngọc Tâm) issues this Data Processing and Privacy Notice under Decree 13 and the VN Securities Law for intended listing on Sàn Giao Dịch Phú Gia.
Personal data means information associated with or helping identify a specific person; MNPI means issuer/securities information not yet public with potential price impact under applicable VN securities rules.
Bà Trần Thị Lan (Investor Relations Officer) at Ngọc Tâm Holdings JSC, DOB 12/08/1993, works from Quận Phú Vinh, Thành phố Nam Giang, uses device NT‑IR‑034 and portal session s=VN-2024-IR-023.
Her internal payroll record shows employee ID IR-LAN-0087 and staff banking acc suffix ‑4421 at Phú Gia Bank; contact lan.tran@ngoctam.vn for DSAR routing.
Access logs may include obfuscated device tags 86 70 90    12 3445 (not an IMEI), u r l: https://sec.ngoctam.vn/disclosures?rel=pre-listing&sid=v n _ 2 4   p r o j.
We do not collect network mac addresses; any “mac label” here refers to mandatory access control only, not hardware identifiers.
Generic demographics such as male, 30–40, central region, or role titles and cities are used for analytics and do not identify a person alone.
Example codes like PG-CC-221, DOB 05/03/1990, and account suffix xxxx-1122 are format samples in training materials and are not linked to any individual.
For securities disclosure, draft prospectus data tagged “pre-offer v8” and SkyLedger Pro exports may be MNPI until published by the Ủy Ban Chứng Khoán Bình An.
Internal banking and transaction documents (salary runs, vendor settlements) are processed by NTH Shared Services Ltd. under this DPA with retention of 24 months unless a longer statutory period applies.
Public-source references from industry directories may be used to verify job titles; this document contains no trading recommendations and is not material non-public information.
Data subjects may submit access, correction, or deletion requests to dpo@ngoctam.vn, or via https://privacy.ngoctam.vn/form?req=dsar&case=VN%2FNT%2F2 0 2 4‑A; we will respond within 72 hours where feasible.
Cross-border transfer is restricted; if we use cloud processing with Nam Giang Compute Co., we apply transfer impact assessments and data localization per Decree 13.
We log audit trails for issuer communications, including session reference V N‑IR‑023‑log and location stamp “PVinh‑NamGiang corridor” which is a routing tag and not a precise address.
project note: not final, waiting for sign‑off from finance ops; after approval we will sync with compliance and the exchange filing team.
